case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. vs. TONGUE, LYDIA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TONGUE, LYDIA
DECLARATION GIVING PROPERTY MANAGER AUTHORITY TO SUE ON OWNERS BEHALF FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.
